name: 5-and-5 Power Lapse Protection

eligibility.description: Applies to the lapse of a general power of appointment created after October 21, 1942.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a power of appointment to lapse annually without being treated as a taxable release, up to the greater of $5,000 or 5% of the assets.
